small.name: Typical Small Town Hall
small.notes: Town meeting room; clerk offices; building department; police sub-station

medium.name: Cambridge City Hall Annex
medium.notes: Municipal offices; public service counters; council chambers; community meeting rooms

large.name: San Francisco City Hall
large.notes: Beaux-Arts landmark; Board of Supervisors; Mayor's office; ceremonial rotunda; multiple departments

plan_archetypes.notes: Branching-civic from main lobby; donut for courthouses with atrium
